title: Which angels do you want to see
display_title: Which angels do you want to see
wikitext:
[]: Which angels do you want to see?             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue May 08, 2007 7:43 pm At this point, it doesn't seem likely that all of the Angels will be featured in Rebuild. The format is very distinct from that of the TV show and to include all of them would really be crowding the field. We can assume that Adam, Lillith, Ramiel and Tabris will be present, leaving the other 13 angels to compete for the limited screen time. We can probably count on seeing the perennial favorite, Sachiel. My guess is that we'll also see the more significant angels that come in towards the end (Bardiel, Zeruel, Arael and Armisael). BTW, if you want Sachiel just text "VOTE" to 5766!

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue May 08, 2007 7:44 pm I would actually like to see a small footage of how Adam and Lilith came upon Earth...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 08, 2007 7:45 pm We can do without Matarael and Sandaphon. Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga. But I have to say, if Rebuild follows the original closely, it has to have Ireul, Arael, and Armisael, for how crucial they were to the three pilots' development.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 08, 2007 7:52 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 08, 2007 7:54 pm Reichu wrote: Opteron-03 wrote: I would actually like to see a small footage of how Adam and Lilith came upon Earth...

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue May 08, 2007 7:54 pm Reichu wrote: Opteron-03 wrote: I would actually like to see a small footage of how Adam and Lilith came upon Earth...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Tue May 08, 2007 7:59 pm Iblis and Baraqijal ( i mispelled some where i know it!)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue May 08, 2007 8:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Tue May 08, 2007 8:39 pm BobBQ wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 08, 2007 8:43 pm Operation Yashima wrote: BobBQ wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Tue May 08, 2007 8:57 pm All of 'em. It's already stupid enough that they cut some of them out of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 08, 2007 9:00 pm felineki wrote: All of 'em. It's already stupid enough that they cut some of them out of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Typhus » Tue May 08, 2007 9:11 pm why cant we call the angels by the numbered order in the series, i cant fucking remember the names god damnit

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Tue May 08, 2007 9:14 pm Reichu wrote: felineki wrote: All of 'em. It's already stupid enough that they cut some of them out of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 08, 2007 9:46 pm Typhus wrote: why cant we call the angels by the numbered order in the series, i cant fucking remember the names god damnit

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue May 08, 2007 10:08 pm Reichu wrote: Well, technically, none of the Angels' names are really their names, just designations borrowed from Judaic malakhim (mostly).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 08, 2007 10:31 pm Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Gaghiel can get compressed down like in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed May 09, 2007 2:19 am I'd love to see them do some new Angels. Something fresh and original that hasn't been seen before. Nah. So far I'm guessing Ramiel will have a nice new silver or golr outlining or something to go along with her old diamond shape.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Wed May 09, 2007 4:27 am BrikHaus wrote: And if Ramiel doesn't make an appearence you won't watch it? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 09, 2007 6:32 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Oh come on, the manner in which they defeat Gaghiel is probably one of the most hoakey and immature elements in the entire series.
